boards.name: Invoicing
boards.description:
Status Definitions:

Assessment - In the initial stages of case review and document collection

Requested Information - Awaiting information requested from company/employee

Reviewing Docs - Reviewing the documentation received

Obtaining Documents/translations - Working on obtaining documents and/or translations for the employee

Drafting Application - Drafting application paperwork

Documents Out for Signature - Application forms and letters out for signature to company/employee

Preparing Filing - Application in final stage of preparation prior to filing 

Filed/Pending Approval - Case has been filed and waiting for decision from authorities

Approved - Government agency has approved the application

Consular Visa Stage - Employee to obtain consular issued visa

Awaiting Applicant's Travel - Employee is authorized for travel to destination when he/she ready

In-Country Stage - Employee to complete formalities after arrival in destination country, such as local registration/immigration office visit.

Appt. made at authority - If required, appointment made for employee.

Case Completed - All necessary action for case is completed.

Track Expiration - Internal tracking of expiration required.

Expiration Tracking - Expiration date tracking for future renewal.

No Renewal Required - Renewal is not required, per visa type or per confirmation of client.

On Hold - Case on hold per client request.

Case Cancelled - Case cancelled per client request or due to inactivity. A partial invoice or cancellation fee will be applied.

Case Cancelled no bill - Case cancelled per client request or due to inactivity and no billing necessary.
